introSection: Pitts Special is a steel roller coaster at PowerPark in Kauhava, Southern Ostrobothnia, Finland. It is a Gerstlauer Infinity Coaster that opened on 24 June 2020.
fullText: Pitts Special is a steel roller coaster at PowerPark in Kauhava, Southern Ostrobothnia, Finland. It is a Gerstlauer Infinity Coaster that opened on 24 June 2020.
